top_signals.title: Approachable Luxury Father's Day Gifts
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg Pursuit's global luxury editor Chris Rovzner joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to emphasize the importance of choosing gifts that feel personal and useful rather than obligatory this Father's Day. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial to fund UFC fighter bonuses in USD1 stablecoin at White House event
top_signals.summary: The deal puts USD1 branding inside the Octagon at an event held on the White House South Lawn, on President Trump's 80th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
